creator: yerenkow@gmail.com
text:
Currently, such tools as poudriere, ezjail, etc are using jails.
But, jail names aren't validated there (at least in poudriere).
For example, you can create podudriere-jail "9.1R", but you can't run build - since jail failing start jail with such name.
To not reimplement name validation in many places, jail subsyste, should provide unified way to validate jail names.
